cards.title: Teen Social Media Self-Worth: A Parent's Guide
cards.body: Sensitive teens face real challenges with social media and peer pressure affecting self-esteem. Rather than fighting the problem, parents can use curiosity to understand and support their teens' emotional world.

cards.title: When Resistant Teens Refuse Therapy Help
cards.body: Getting a reluctant teenager into therapy requires more than logical arguments. Borrowing techniques from Dialectical Behavior Therapy, curiosity and validation work better than persuasion.

cards.title: Surrogacy Options and Family Planning Challenges
cards.body: Australian families seeking surrogacy face complex decisions with significant costs and ethical concerns. The law reform commission is examining how to better regulate the industry.

cards.title: Should Teens Share Neurodivergence in College Essays
cards.body: College applicants with ADHD, autism, or other neurodivergence face a strategic decision about disclosure. A former admissions consultant explores the pros and cons of revealing this personal information.

cards.title: ADHD Medication and Hidden Autism Traits
cards.body: ADHD symptoms can mask autism traits, making diagnosis difficult in neurodivergent children. Treatment may shift the balance and reveal previously hidden autistic characteristics.

cards.title: Why Adults Need Play Just Like Kids
cards.body: Play isn't just for children—it offers proven cognitive, physical, and social benefits for adults too. Rediscovering playfulness can improve mental health and resilience.

cards.title: Summer Holiday Childcare: One Parent's Solution
cards.body: Natalie took unpaid leave to manage her daughter's six-week summer break alongside her husband's schedule. Many working parents struggle to balance childcare with limited vacation time.

cards.title: Children Dropping Parents' Surnames: Legal Change
cards.body: Some young adults are legally changing their surnames away from their father's name. Hannah's choice reflects broader conversations about family identity and personal autonomy.
